mapper.sql: id, user_id, clean_content, clean_interaction, apply_time, scheduled_time, status, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_cancellation (id, user_id, clean_content, clean_interaction, apply_time, scheduled_time, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{cleanContent}, #{cleanInteraction}, #{applyTime}, #{scheduledTime}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE account_cancellation SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM account_cancellation WHERE user_id = #{userId} and deleted = 0
